mapper.select:
SELECT id, tag_number, device, purpose, instrument_name, measurement_range, manufacturer, medium, medium_status, medium_pressure, medium_temperature, factory_number, remark, status, dv_type FROM dv_flowmetre_info
AND tag_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.tagNumber}, '%')
AND instrument_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.instrumentName}, '%')
AND status = #{queryParams.status}
AND dv_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.dvType}, '%')

SELECT id, tag_number, device, purpose, instrument_name, measurement_range, manufacturer, medium, medium_status, medium_pressure, medium_temperature, factory_number, remark, status, dv_type FROM dv_flowmetre_info
AND tag_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tagNumber}, '%')
AND instrument_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{instrumentName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
AND dv_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dvType}, '%')
